title: Sprint 5: Quality, SLAs & Final Polish
head: feature/sprint-05-sla-polish
body:
# Sprint 5: Quality, SLAs & Final Polish

## Summary
SLA policy engine, in-app notification system, comprehensive test expansion (64 tests), UI polish, and complete documentation.

## What's New

### SLA Policy Engine
- Per-org, per-priority SLA policies with response/resolution time targets
- Automatic SLA status computation: on_track, warning, breached, met, none
- Warning threshold at 80% of resolution time
- Admin-only CRUD via /api/sla-policies
- SLA badges on Dashboard + TicketDetail with deadline display

### Notification System
- In-app notifications on ticket creation, status/priority/assignment changes
- Actor excluded from self-notifications
- NotificationBell: bell icon, unread badge, dropdown, 30s polling, mark read

### UI Polish
- Loading spinners, empty states, consistent date formatting
- SLA color-coded badges (green/yellow/red)

### Documentation
- User Manual (docs/USER_MANUAL.md)
- Technical Docs (docs/TECHNICAL.md)

## Test Results
- 64 tests, 139 assertions, all passing
- New: SlaPolicyTest (10), NotificationTest (8)

## Build
- Frontend: 707KB JS, 20KB CSS

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] SLA breaches flagged in UI
- [x] Notifications on status/assignment changes
- [x] 64 tests passing
- [x] No UI glitches
- [x] User Manual complete
